incident.title: Auth service elevated error rate post Redis config change

log_entries.description: auth: POST /validate_token returning 500 at 40% error rate

log_entries.summary: Checkout service failing dependent auth calls
log_entries.description: checkout.v2 experiencing cascading failures from auth-service dependency

log_entries.summary: redis-auth cache hit rate collapsed — now 5% (baseline 98%)
log_entries.description: Cache miss explosion on redis-auth, all traffic hitting origin

notes.content: FYI team — I deployed redis-auth TTL change (5s → 500ms) at 13:55. Testing if this is related.
@mei.zhang 500ms TTL on auth tokens seems way too short — tokens expire mid-request → re-auth → cache miss → DB hit → auth 500s → checkout cascade. Is that what you were testing for?
You're right. Reverting TTL to 5s now. Should've canary'd this in staging with realistic load.
